backend/main.mo: Main actor module defining Case, Activity, Document, and Comment types with persistent state maps, authorization mixins, and CRUD operations for cases, activities, documents, and comments with permission checks.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that adds a commentsMap field to the actor state, preserving existing cases, activities, and documents data during upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: adding comments to activity timeline and populating comment history when clicking the history icon.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including App, Layout, TaskQueue, CaseDetail, ActivitySection, ActivityTimeline, and various UI components with their specific functionality and styling details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and brand colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication check, and conditional rendering of LoginPrompt or main router based on auth state.
Activity section component with comment textarea, history toggle button, and Add Comment button that submits comments via useAddComment mutation and displays ActivityTimeline when history is shown.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Comment history timeline component with detailed visual specifications, fetching comments via useGetCaseComments, displaying them in color-coded blocks (teal/gray/blue) with timestamps and author names, sorted newest first with 3-comment max height and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Displays a clickable card for a debt collection case with debtor name, customer ID, phone number, DPD badge (color-coded by severity), and status badge. Navigates to case detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Renders a timeline of comments for a case with color-coded backgrounds, timestamps, and a vertical timeline connector. Shows "No comments yet" message when empty.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark icon for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of case documents with file type icons and preview buttons, plus Upload and Scan action buttons. Uses dummy data for now.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding, logo, and logout button that clears Internet Identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header, outlet for page content, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page with Kollect Lite branding and Internet Identity login button, shown when user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI preview.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (ESCALATED, ACTIVE, PTP) with appropriate styling for each state.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines Comment interface and exports DUMMY_COMMENTS array with sample comment data for multiple cases, including timestamps and agent names.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data including cases, activities, documents, and comments with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light/dark theme variables for a teal-branded debt collection UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, payment details, and sections for activities, documents, and phone mockup using dummy data.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a searchable list of 20+ dummy collection cases with filtering and a phone mockup sidebar.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme with container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for Kollect Lite comment system features, documenting existing features for activity timeline integration and history view, plus pending feature requests for interactive commenting, color-coded comment blocks with vertical scrolling (max 3 visible), and visual specification documentation.
